zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena MALASPINA於1260年出生在義大利托斯卡納馬薩-卡拉拉姆拉左時，她的父親Moroello Malaspina35歲，母親Berlende Grimaldi30歲。她和Giberto di Corregio至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1303年享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: MALASPINA
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Tino, Aldo, Antonio, Carmella, Guido, Mario.
from mala (feminine of malo) ‘bad, evil’ + spina ‘thorn’, applied as a nickname and personal name.

variants.name: La Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Mario, Rosario, Sebastiano, Carmelo, Gino, Giuseppe, Ignazio, Javier, Orazio, Salvatore.

from spina ‘thorn’ (from Latin spina), with the definite article la, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or in an area of scrubland, or (in a transferred sense) for someone who lived by the crest or ridge of a hill. It could also be a nickname for a tall, thin, spiky person.

variants.name: Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Ciro, Antonio, Carmine, Angelo, Rocco, Vito, Carlo, Carmela, Santo, Vincenza, Vincenzo.

from spina ‘thorn, thorn bush’, used as a nickname in various senses, including ‘distress, sorrow’ (alluding to Christ's crown of thorns), and also as a personal name; or alternatively a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word (in some instances with reference to the dedication of a shrine).

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena MALASPINA was born in 1260, in Mulazzo, Massa-Carrara, Tuscany, Italy, her father, Moroello Malaspina, was 35 and her mother, Berlende Grimaldi, was 30. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Giberto di Corregio. She died about 1303, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena MALASPINA est née en 1260, à Mulazzo, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italie, son père, Moroello Malaspina, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Berlende Grimaldi, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Giberto di Corregio. Elle est décédée environ 1303, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helena MALASPINA 1260 in Mulazzo, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Moroello Malaspina 35 und ihre Mutter Berlende Grimaldi 30. Sie hatte mit Giberto di Corregio mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1303 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helena MALASPINA è nata il nel 1260 nel Mulazzo, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italia, sua padre, Moroello Malaspina, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Berlende Grimaldi, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Giberto di Corregio. Morì circa 1303, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helena MALASPINAが1260年にイタリアトスカナマッサ-カーララムラズゾで生まれた時，父Moroello Malaspinaは35歳，母Berlende Grimaldiは30歳であった。彼女はGiberto di Corregioとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1303年に44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena MALASPINA(이)가 1260년 이탈리아 토스캔아 마사-카라라 뮐라즈오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Moroello Malaspina(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Berlende Grimaldi(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Giberto di Corregio(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1303년 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helena MALASPINA nasceu em 1260, em Mulazzo, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Itália, seu pai, Moroello Malaspina, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Berlende Grimaldi, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Giberto di Corregio. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1303, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena MALASPINA родилась в 1260 г. в местности мулацзо, масса-каррара, тоскана, Италия, её отцу по имени Moroello Malaspina было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Berlende Grimaldi, 30. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Giberto di Corregio. Она умерла около 1303 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helena MALASPINA nació en 1260, en Mulazzo, Massa-Carrara, Toscana, Italia, su papá, Moroello Malaspina, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Berlende Grimaldi, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Giberto di Corregio. Murió aproximadamente 1303, a la edad de 44 años.
